recent_posts.text:
Relay Warns of Scam Tokens on Robinhood Chain
> “Scam tokens designed to remove themselves after purchase. If you bought one, the funds you spent are unfortunately gone.”
Source:
https://x.com/RelayProtocol/status/2075244605633917320

tweet.text:
We’re aware of reports of tokens disappearing from wallets after purchase on Robinhood Chain.

There’s been an increase in scam tokens designed to remove themselves after purchase. If you bought one, the funds you spent are unfortunately gone. We’re blocking these tokens as they show up and verifying safe ones.

Importantly, this is not a wallet compromise. Your private keys and other balances are untouched — nothing beyond the scam token purchase itself is at risk.

Reminder: anyone can list a token. Stick to tokens verified by us or another trusted source.

If you’ve been affected, reach out at http://support.relay.link

recent_posts.text:

https://x.com/rebeccatorrenc5/status/2075229405371109748

tweet.text:
Scoop: Mercor is discussing a new fundraise at a ~$20 billion valuation.

The AI training startup has received at least one term sheet at that level, sources tell us, which would double its last valuation. 

Scoop w @nmasc_: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-09/ai-training-startup-mercor-discusses-20-billion-valuation

recent_posts.text:
Acquire the distribution
https://x.com/brendanfoody/status/2075256423211229537

tweet.text:
I'm excited to announce that @mercor_ai is acquiring @deeptuneai.

While Mercor is the largest RL Environments company, Deeptune is the top vendor to Frontier Labs for the apps that make those environments work.

The barrier to automating everything you do on your laptop with Claude or ChatGPT is covering the full distribution of apps, worlds, and tasks across the economy.

Mercor's talent network has enabled us to lead the industry in scaling up the production of worlds and tasks. Deeptune is the best at the apps. Together, we make the best environments in the world.

I couldn't be more thrilled to work with @timlupo and the entire Deeptune team.

Jito Partners With Privy to Launch “Fullsend”
> Fullsend is a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.
> “By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability”.
Source:
https://x.com/jito_sol/status/2075249175046856890

tweet.text:
We're proud to partner with @privy_io in launching Fullsend, a service built to ensure reliable, institutional-grade transaction landing for all Solana transactions via Privy.

By routing through FullSend by default since January, inclusion latency dropped to as low as 50ms for users with 99.999% landing reliability, while still fulfilling Best Execution and other obligations.

Source:
https://x.com/HyperliquidPC/status/2075234343832678602

HYPERLIQUID POLICY CENTRE FILE RESPONSE TO CFTC'S REQUEST TO IDENTIFY FUTURE REGULATION, ASKING TO FORMALLY RECOGNISE THAT ONCHAIN PROTOCOLS DO NOT REQUIRE REGISTRATION, THAT NON-CUSTODIAL WALLETS DO NOT PERFORM THE ROLE OF FINANCIAL INTERMEDIARIES, AND TO GIVE A CLEAR PATH TO RUN REGULATION FUNCTIONS ONCHAIN: BLOG

PSA: YouTube doxes your channel name if you share a video link
To remove it (only with the YouTube app)
• Tap your profile picture
• Tap the gear icon (Settings) at the top left corner
• Tap Privacy and scroll down and look for "Channel visibility for shared links"
• Toggle the switch off
(Same for Instagram btw, had some crypto anon friends that shared IG links with me and doxxed themselves in the process kek)

Aave Labs Introduces Stable Vaults
An all-in-one solution for embedding fixed-rate stablecoin yield into any financial product.
> Stable Vaults convert variable onchain lending rates into a fixed rate a business can offer its users, and they make it easy to manage the rebalancing, the cross-chain operations, & the rate paid to users
Source:
https://aave.com/blog/introducing-stable-vaults

Solving the RWA Problem
> Mike Cagney argues that the biggest bottleneck for tokenized RWAs is not the assets themselves but DeFi's limited capital base and poor user experience, which prevent institutional adoption.
> He proposes a TradFi-friendly, self-custody wallet with simplified onboarding to bridge TradFi + DeFi and expand onchain asset financing.
> “Blockchain today is a pond and TradFi is the ocean. The prize is building the channel through which the ocean flows in.”
👇
Source:
https://x.com/mcagney/status/2074973575409459393
